title: bunium hermonis
intro: Bunium hermonis, also known as Syrian lovage or Syrian celery seed, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Bunium hermonis include relief from indigestion, bloating, and gas, as well as potential protection against certain types of cancer and cardiovascular disease. Bunium hermonis is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or oil, and can also be added to food or taken as a spice.
